title: Drag'n'drop OpenCode Config Generator
abstract: Say hello to a wizard-like tool that allows you to generate open-source code configurations with just a drag-and-drop! Say goodbye to complex coding and hello to simplicity. Give it a try and make programming a breeze!
abstract_zh: 嘿小伙伴们，这回给你安利个神器：只需拖拽几下就能生成开源代码配置的工具！它就像魔法一样简单，再也不用担心复杂的代码了。赶紧来试试吧，让编程不再难如登天！
